content.en:
As time passed, Ye Tian's Perfection Ultimate Body became stronger and stronger, and this was the overall improvement.

Ye Tian had been absorbing and refining this black liquid to strengthen his Perfection Ultimate Body.

How strong it is is also an improvement of its own strength.

......

Void Heaven Palace.

Ye Tian's other replica body is still here, and he came to find the Silver Dance Jizun on this day~.

"Silver Dance Extreme Venerable, do you know why the Perfection Ultimate Body can continue to improve?"

Ye Tian asked.

Silver Dance Supreme Venerable smiled, "You should have obtained the resources from the Ultimate Dark Domain that can improve the Perfection Ultimate Body, right? The Ultimate Body of Perfection is only the Ultimate Body of the Nine Realms Peak. And above the perfect ultimate body of the ultimate realm, there is also a realm, the ultimate body, which represents the ultimate of everything. However, it is difficult, almost impossible, for the Ultimate Body to evolve into the Ultimate Body. Anyway, among so many Ultimate Realm Lords in the Sea of Dimensions, I haven't heard of anyone whose Ultimate Body has completed its transformation. "

"By the way, that ultimate creature in the Ultimate Dark Domain can fight against the Extreme Venerable of the Heavens with its own strength, and it may be the ultimate body, which is why it is so powerful!"

Silver Dance Exalted spoke his guess.

The ultimate body!

Ye Tian understood, it turned out that above the ultimate body, there was such an ultimate body.

But Silver Dance Extreme Venerable also said that it was too difficult to train to the ultimate body, and even the Mitian Skill Venerable did not succeed, and it was extremely difficult for him to train to the ultimate body, and he was not sure.

He can use the resources of the Ultimate Dark Domain to improve the Ultimate Body, and his strength can also be improved a lot.

Or cultivate more of the ultimate system, and practice more to become a complete ultimate body, and under the superposition, you can also increase a lot of strength.

It's just that the more Ultimate Bodies stacked, the lower the subsequent increase.

In the end, it is still necessary to improve the realm of ultimate rules.

Ye Tian obtained the Pearl of Eternal Night, which was his luck.

But the pearl of eternal night alone will definitely not work.

"There must be more opportunities in the Ultimate Dark Domain, and that is my chance!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

He began to continue to have the Ultimate Creature copy the body to obtain that black liquid in the Ultimate Dark Realm, and he wanted to refine the Ultimate Body to the point where it was almost impossible to progress.

And just like that, another long time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian comprehended the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule to the seventy-second level, and the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule to the twenty-first level.

His strength has also improved a lot compared to the past, and he has refined a large amount of black liquid, and his Perfection Ultimate Body is also much stronger than in the past.

But now, the black liquid didn't help him much, and it was difficult to continue to improve his Perfection Ultimate Body.

"Gotta find a better treasure!"

Ye Tian muttered.

So, his ultimate creature replicated the body and continued to search for the treasure.

And there are indeed many opportunities in the Ultimate Dark Domain, otherwise there would not be such a terrifying Ultimate Creature here, so that the Heavenly Extreme Venerable and they would not be able to deal with it.

Another long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian found an ancient black giant pillar in the depths of the Ultimate Dark Domain, it ran through this piece of heaven and earth, and it was extremely suppressed, many Ultimate Creatures were here, but they couldn't really get close, once they got close, they would be suppressed so much that they couldn't move.

But many of the ultimate creatures are still here, lingering and reluctant to leave.

"What is this black pillar?"

Ye Tian tried to get closer, but he was also suppressed and unapproachable, but he still tried his best to get closer.

Ultimately.

The strength of this replica body is still too weak to really enter at all.

Thereupon.

He chose to cultivate the ultimate system of this ultimate dark domain to enhance this replica body.

He discovered that the ultimate system of this Ultimate Dark Domain had many places, just like the Sea of Dimensions.

"Then it also cultivates the Darkest Ultimate System of the Extreme Dark Domain. "

It's just that it's very difficult to cultivate the Ultimate Ultimate System, and this Ultimate System seems to be very suitable for Ultimate Creatures, but not for them, and there are not many who can really be cultivated.

After Ye Tian obtained the Ultimate Ultimate System, he began to cultivate, and he easily cultivated to the realm of the Ultimate Lord, and then continued to improve.

Coupled with the use of the resources of the Ultimate Dark Domain to improve to the Dark Ultimate System, it took a long time to successfully comprehend the rules of the Ultimate Darkness.

Then, Ye Tian used the Pearl of Eternal Night to comprehend the ultimate rules of the dark, and the effect was okay.

In addition, Ye Tian also copied the ultimate talent of those ultimate creatures in the Ultimate Dark Domain, and the efficiency of comprehension was naturally higher.

Double to the Darkest Ultimate Rule!

Triple to the Dark Ultimate Rule!

......

Unconsciously, Ye Tian gradually comprehended the Ninefold Ultimate Rule.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to attack the Ultimate Realm Lord of the Dark Ultimate System, and he easily broke through.

And his replica body also controls the Darkest Ultimate System.

In fact, this Ultimate Creature's body itself has mastered the Darkest Ultimate System, but he couldn't use it before, resulting in a very weak strength.

But now, he can use the strength of this replica body.

After that, he continued to comprehend the Ultimate Rules, and as the realm of the Ultimate Ultimate Rules continued to improve, the strength of his Ultimate Creature's replica body became stronger.

After a long time.

Ye Tian had successfully raised the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule to the twentieth realm, and the strength of his Ultimate Creature's replication body had naturally skyrocketed.

this day.

Ye Tian went to attack the black giant pillar again, rushed in desperately, and finally successfully broke into the range of the black giant pillar at the cost of being injured.

At this time.

There doesn't seem to be much repression left.

He looked around, and there were quite a few ultimate creatures here to comprehend and cultivate.

Ye Tian also lay on the ground, looking at the black giant pillar, silently contemplating.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian understood.

This black giant pillar helps to comprehend the ultimate rules of the dark, and the effect is very good, no wonder everyone comes here to comprehend.

Not only that, but this black giant pillar seemed to contain an ultimate path, a path that could elevate the Ultimate Body to the Ultimate Body.

But it's hard to realize!

"Rush in, it's worth it!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

He is going to first upgrade to the Dark Ultimate Rule, and quickly raise this Ultimate Rule to a thousand.
